# Hot Wheels Detailing - Project Setup & Development Guide

## Project Overview
A responsive Next.js website for Hot Wheels Detailing with excellent animations and a modern design for showcasing car detailing services.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 14+ with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Setup Progress Checklist

- [x] Create .github directory and copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Set up Next.js project with create-next-app
- [x] Create landing page with hero section
- [x] Add animation components with Framer Motion
- [x] Create services and portfolio sections
- [x] Build responsive navigation and header
- [x] Add contact and CTA sections
- [x] Test responsive design
- [x] Add Hot Wheels car images and animations
- [x] Set up email notifications for bookings
- [x] Integrate free stock car images
- [x] Create booking API route

## Development Commands

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Run development server
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Start production server
npm start
```

## Project Structure
```
hotweels-detailing/
├── app/
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   ├── page.tsx
│   └── ...
├── components/
│   ├── Hero.tsx
│   ├── Navigation.tsx
│   ├── Services.tsx
│   └── ...
├── public/
├── styles/
├── tailwind.config.ts
└── package.json
```

## Features to Implement
- ✨ Animated hero section with parallax effect
- 🎬 Smooth page transitions and scroll animations
- 📱 Fully responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- 🏎️ Service showcase with hover animations
- 📸 Portfolio/gallery section
- 📞 Contact and booking CTA
- 🎨 Modern, professional design for detailing services
